def find_maximal_cliques(graph):
    maximal_cliques = []
    
    all_vertices = set(graph.keys())
    for neighbors in graph.values():
        all_vertices.update(neighbors)

    P = all_vertices

    _bron_kerbosch_pivot(graph, [], P, set(), maximal_cliques)
    
    return maximal_cliques

def _bron_kerbosch_pivot(graph, R, P, X, maximal_cliques):
    if not P and not X:
        if R:
            maximal_cliques.append(sorted(R))
        return

    pivot_set = P.union(X)
    
    if not pivot_set:
        return

    u = max(pivot_set, key=lambda vertex: len(P.intersection(graph.get(vertex, set()))))

    P_minus_Nu = P.difference(graph.get(u, set()))

    for v in list(P_minus_Nu):
        _bron_kerbosch_pivot(graph,
                             R + [v],
                             P.intersection(graph.get(v, set())),
                             X.intersection(graph.get(v, set())),
                             maximal_cliques)

        P.remove(v)
        X.add(v)
